item.title: Republicans have nothing but hate
item.dc:creator: JamieSays

item.title: They're lying to you about solar
item.description: Solar panels wear out not because the material is used up but mostly because the glass changes shape (scratches and clouding and such). You can just melt it down and put it back into the correct shape again. The cleanest source of parts for solar panels are old solar panels. Similar for batteries, the most common source of materials for lead acid batteries is old batteries, it's why you get a discount if you bring your dead one in. The same is true for Lithium ion ones, especially car or grid scale sized ones. (sorry for the potato quality, you can't see community notes without an account so I had to use a repost and couldn't grab a fresh screenshot)
item.dc:creator: meme2zombie

26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @PaintMags did this gorgeous lake painting. Check out their other posts for more awesome art.
27 Man Tax: Dylan O'Brien
“The eyes of fear want you to put bigger locks on your doors, buy guns, close yourself off. The eyes of love, instead, see all of us as one.” - Bill Hicks So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: I taped some bottom shelf memes to a random tree I found in a church parking lot
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
If you're still scrolling, then I assume you and I must have similar tastes in shitposting. Well, all these memes were stolen fair and square from discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka Feel free to dive into the dumpster fire to steal and deal memes 24/7.
Calm down, I didn't crop the watermark. This is Cyanide and Happiness.
This dump was brought to you by the meme addicted insomniacs from the Bottom Shelf Community where we shitpost 24/7 Join for the NSFW memes. Join for the games. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving degen there to play it with you. We stream games on twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Join to ping @humlyhums Join to meet @crimebrulee the biggest problem in the server. Deal memes. Steal memes. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Serious momentum, my dudes. Gonna keep it going, full steam.
item.description:
Longest I have gone without a drink since my momma passed roughly a year ago. She was always worried about my drinking and one of the last conversations I had with her before she passed was about how I had been 3 weeks sober (at the time. Gonna keep doing this for me but also for my Momma’s memory.
Have some Cheddar Bae Biscuit tax. He’s at the vet and unhappy at the moment.
item.dc:creator: BobWeAdaBabyEetsAboy

item.title: In Fairness. — The President Of The United States. About American Soldiers Dying. In Fairness.
item.description: Trump was just asked on Fox News if Putin is helping Iran kill American soldiers. His response was "yeah a little bit" and then said "in fairness WE help Ukraine so it's fine." THE PRESIDENT JUST SHRUGGED OFF RUSSIA HELPING KILL HIS OWN SOLDIERS. ON FUCKING FOX NEWS. ??? "In fairness we help them also. It's like hey, they do it and we do it." SIR. SIR. That is not geopolitical analysis. That is a man explaining why two wrongs make a right TO JUSTIFY THE COUNTRY HE TRUSTS MORE THAN HIS OWN CIA HELPING KILL AMERICAN SOLDIERS. ?⚰️? Six confirmed dead. 560 reported. Russia feeding Iran targeting data. And the President's response on national television is essentially "well technically it's fair because both sides are doing it." THESE ARE YOUR SOLDIERS. THEIR FAMILIES ARE WATCHING THIS. WHAT THE FUCK. ????️ Trump just told Fox News that Putin helping Iran kill Americans is fine because "in fairness" America helps Ukraine. He has officially both-sided the deaths of his own soldiers on breakfast television. History will not be kind. It will not be kind AT ALL. ?⚰️?? #TrumpPutin #IranWar #AmericanSoldiers #GoldStarFamilies #Treason #RussiaGate #InFairness #BothSides #FoxNews #WTF
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge

To be fair most of the time I just dress like Adam Sandler..
It's the autism, in my case...
The average lesbian experience..
two girls, chilling on the sofa, 5 feet apart cause they’re not gay
